output.code:
# Load the text file to compute indices
path = "/mnt/data/file-AiLGb8Vqn1Cn4JfziLpFwc-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

text[:5000], len(text)

# find positions of quotes
quote_positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '\"']
quote_positions[:10], len(quote_positions)

first_start = quote_positions[0] + 1
first_end = quote_positions[1]
ayah1 = text[first_start:first_end]
first_start, first_end, ayah1

second_start = quote_positions[2] + 1
second_end = quote_positions[3]
ayah2 = text[second_start:second_end]
second_start, second_end, ayah2

third_start = quote_positions[4] + 1
third_end = len(text)
hadith = text[third_start:third_end]
third_start, third_end, hadith[-30:], len(hadith)
